CustomField.formula: IF(TM_Post_Installation_SAP_Score_Max__c >= 92, "A", IF(TM_Post_Installation_SAP_Score_Max__c >= 81, "B", IF(TM_Post_Installation_SAP_Score_Max__c >= 69, "C", IF(TM_Post_Installation_SAP_Score_Max__c >= 55, "D", IF(TM_Post_Installation_SAP_Score_Max__c >= 39, "E", IF(TM_Post_Installation_SAP_Score_Max__c >= 21, "F", IF(TM_Post_Installation_SAP_Score_Max__c >= 0, "G", "")))))))
CustomField.label: TM Post Installation EPC
